service.name: Pipedrive CRM API
service.description_for_ai: Sales-focused CRM. Deals, contacts, organizations, activities, pipelines. Visual sales pipeline. Popular with SMBs. Free trial 14 days. Use for sales pipeline management, deal tracking, contact management.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get sales deals from Pipedrive pipeline. Filter by status, stage, owner. Returns deal value, close date, and associated contacts/companies.

status.description: open, won, lost, or all. Default open.

stage_id.description: Pipeline stage ID to filter by. Get stage IDs from GET /stages

filter_id.description: Apply a saved filter by its ID

sort.description: Sort field and direction e.g. 'add_time DESC', 'value ASC'

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new sales deal in Pipedrive pipeline with value, close date, and links to contacts/organizations.

currency.description: 3-letter currency code e.g. USD, EUR, RUB

person_id.description: Contact person ID to link deal to

org_id.description: Organization ID to link deal to

stage_id.description: Pipeline stage ID. First stage is default.

user_id.description: Owner user ID. Defaults to API token owner.

pipeline_id.description: Pipeline ID. Default pipeline if not specified.

agent_hints.api_token: Get token: Settings → Personal Preferences → API. Append to every request as ?api_token=...
agent_hints.pagination: Use start and limit params. Response includes additional_data.pagination.more_items_in_collection
agent_hints.custom_fields: Custom fields have hash keys like 'abc123def456'. List all via GET /dealFields, /personFields etc.
agent_hints.webhooks: Set up webhooks in Tools → Webhooks for real-time deal/contact/activity updates.
